export function Introduction() { return (

Composable Containers on-chain

Publish, link, and index structured data containers using MoveVM & IOTA.

Explore Data

Wallet address: Not connected

API Docs

Why BlockPublisher?

🔗 Linked Containers

Attach child containers with ordered indices and immutable history.

📦 On-chain Indexing

Efficient traversal without recursion or missing segments.

⚡ Event Driven

Consume MoveVM events for real-time off-chain indexing.

🛡 Ownership Model

Multi-owner containers with safe removal and permissions.

Universal Output

Use the same data via REST, Thymeleaf, or embed anywhere.

          GET /api/items?containerId=0x...&type=data_item


          GET /view/items?containerId=0x...&type=data_item

Architecture

  • MoveVM smart contracts (IOTA)
  • Event indexing (off-chain)
  • Spring Boot backend
  • Universal HTML output

Build on structured on-chain data

Designed for scale, safety, and composability.

Launch App
); }
